title: Gooey Grape Tagine
description: A sweet and tangy vegetarian dessert inspired by the flavors of Tunisia. A perfect blend of gooey richness and juicy grapes.
instructions: In a baking dish, mix together the halved grapes and Tunisian rich honey.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the grapes are tender and caramelized.
Remove from the oven and stir in the chopped gooey and orange juice.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the gooey is melted and the dessert is bubbly.
Serve warm, garnished with additional grapes if desired.
